title: ononis reclinata subsp. calycina
intro: Ononis reclinata subsp. calycina is a subspecies of the Ononis reclinata plant, commonly known as the "hairy restharrow" or "restharrow", a perennial herbaceous plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Ononis reclinata subsp. calycina include its ability to help manage digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health concerns.
